# Review Fixtures Policy

All review fixtures must be SYNTHETIC. No Amazon-derived review text in this directory.

Adding a new locale fixture requires:

1. This README is re-read in the PR description.
2. Reviewer text is wholly fictional (lorem-ipsum-style or LLM-generated).
3. Reviewer names are fictional.
4. Product names are fictional.
5. No copyrighted content.

Rationale: Amazon review HTML is copyrightable. Real review text in repo is a copyright + ToS exposure.
